Growth Insight
OpenAI reported that it achieved significant growth milestones in 2025, with its revenue reaching approximately $13.1 billion, exceeding its initial target of $10 billion. The company also projected its annual revenue to rise to over $25 billion in 2026, driven by strong demand for its AI products, including ChatGPT, which reached over 900 million weekly active users and more than 50 million paying subscribers. Additionally, OpenAI's enterprise business generated about $10 billion of its total revenue, highlighting the growing importance of corporate customers. The company secured a record-breaking $110 billion funding round led by Amazon, Nvidia, and SoftBank, valuing it at $730 billion pre-money, which is expected to support its expansion and infrastructure needs.

Growth Insight
Polymarket achieved significant growth milestones in 2025, highlighted by a $2 billion investment from Intercontinental Exchange, which valued the company at approximately $9 billion. The platform's trading volume surged, reaching $7.66 billion in January 2026, up from $5.31 billion in December 2025, marking a 44% increase. Additionally, Polymarket reported a record monthly trading volume of $2.28 billion in December 2025. The company also expanded its user base, reaching 491,000 monthly active traders by December 2025, and saw a substantial increase in installs from 30,000 in January to 400,000 by December 2025. Furthermore, Polymarket's fee revenue reached approximately $787,000 in a single week, contributing to a sector-wide record in weekly fees.

Growth Insight
Sage reported a 14% year-on-year increase in pre-tax profit to GBP484 million for the year ended September 30, up from GBP426 million. The company also recorded a 16% increase in underlying operating profit to GBP600 million for the year to end-September, driven by both top-line growth and margin expansion. Additionally, Sage achieved a 10% year-on-year increase in first-quarter organic revenue to GBP647 million, supported by strong growth in its Sage Business Cloud and cloud-native offerings across multiple regions. The company expanded its operations by launching its Sage Intacct cloud financial management solution in Singapore and entered the Kenyan market, targeting mid-sized and SMB organizations. Furthermore, Sage raised $65 million in a Series C funding round led by Goldman Sachs Alternatives, bringing its total funding to $124 million to expand its AI-powered senior care platform.

#  Your Startup Journey Begins Here.
Whether you're looking for co-founders, investors, mentorship or want to join a startup, Foundersbase connects you with the people you need to make it happen!
[ Join Now ](https://us.foundersbase.com/signup) [ Learn more ](https://us.foundersbase.com/#how-it-works)
https://www.foundersbase.com/me/emily90 
![Image Description](https://us.foundersbase.com/assets/img/custom/screenshots/home1.png)
####  Networking for Entrepreneurs
Finding the right co-founders and supporters is tough. Foundersbase connects me with people who share my vision and move things forward.
![Image Description](https://us.foundersbase.com/assets/img/160x160/img3.jpg)
#####  Raphael Alstom
CPO @ Volko
##  Find Co-Founders
Connect with like-minded entrepreneurs to build your dream team and start your business.
[](https://us.foundersbase.com/members)
##  Join a Startup
Discover exciting startup projects and join teams to bring innovative ideas to life.
[](https://us.foundersbase.com/startups)
##  Get Startup Support
Find mentors, investors, and other startup supporters to help you grow your business.
[](https://us.foundersbase.com/login)
##  Let's co-found   
startups together!
The most important decision when building a startup company is who you're building it with. Here you'll find intrinsically motivated team members who go the extra mile and beyond.
[ Join us today! ](https://us.foundersbase.com/jobs)
##  Founders
[](https://us.foundersbase.com/members)

  * Software & SaaS

  * Advertising & Marketing
  * E-Commerce & Retail


* East Florence ](https://us.foundersbase.com/me/EllenH)
[ ![Debopriya Ghosh](https://foundersbase.s3-eu-central-1.amazonaws.com/userfiles/6720_7e6c708e-d1b8-44ab-88a4-dc3dac05b21b.jpg) Debopriya Ghosh Ghosh Laboratory, HydroNurture Venture, Astrocytes

  * Biotech & Pharmaceuticals

##  Connect with   
investors and get funded.
Simply upload a pitch deck and get matched with private investors, business angels and institutional funding partners that help your startup reach the next level.
##  Find business angels and institutional funding partners now. 
[ Upload your pitch deck  ](https://us.foundersbase.com/signup)
![Image Description](https://us.foundersbase.com/assets/img/custom/screenshots/screenshot_beta4.png)
![Image Description](https://us.foundersbase.com/assets/img/custom/screenshots/screenshot_beta6.png)
  * 1,500+ private investors
  * Targeted matching
  * Personal connection
  * Free of charge


##  What is foundersbase?
Foundersbase is a networking platform where startup founders connect with co-founders, entrepreneurial talent, and early supporters to build their ventures.   
  
Members from all over the world create profiles, showcase their startup projects, and engage in direct conversations to form a founding team, find advisors and investors, or recruit startup hires.   
  
Unlike broad networking sites, Foundersbase is specifically designed for founder's needs and uses advanced profile curation technology to ensure that every connection is relevant - whether you're looking for a tech co-founder, a marketing expert, or someone to invest early support in your idea.
[ Join us today! ](https://us.foundersbase.com/signup)
